creator: raob@vivaldi.net
text:
(In reply to Adriaan de Groot from comment #5)
I am using the main ports tree, and it contains plasma6, and I am running a KDE Plasma6 desktop, not Plasma5.  So, I thought I would have the right environment to run the newer version of Calligra.  I run Calligra 4.0.1 on Manjaro and Arch on these KDE Plasma6 desktop environments.  I have never been able to get a Wayaland session of any kind running on FreeBSD.  I tried Wayfire and Hyprland by following the FreeBSD Manual and also by looking at other people's efforts, but still could not get Wayland running after I installed KDE Plasma6 on FreeBSD-14.1-RELEASE.

I'll give the tarball you created a try.  But, why cannot Calligra be in the ports tree when both Plasma6 and Plasma5 and KF5 and KF6 are both in the ports tree?  I am not understanding well.
